unified_holdout.quality_status: reference (produced clean_center target by definition; SNR vs target undefined)
unified_holdout.note: Production FACETpy AAS run on reconstructed-discontinuous data yields +0 dB because of window-stitching artifacts. The TIMING here is real (153 ms for 4980 channel-windows on the reconstructed continuous signal). For QUALITY, AAS = reference target by definition.
